synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-50063 Oracle Linux 9 pykickstart bug fix update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50063
description:
[3.32.15-1.0.2]
- Sync OL9 handler definitions with RHEL9
- Fixes bug where Kickstart reports ostreecontainer is an unknown command [Orabug: 38856710] [JIRA: OLDIS-50232]
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-50063

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-50063.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
pykickstart-3.32.15-1.0.2.el9.noarch.rpm
python3-kickstart-3.32.15-1.0.2.el9.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
pykickstart-3.32.15-1.0.2.el9.noarch.rpm
python3-kickstart-3.32.15-1.0.2.el9.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/pykickstart-3.32.15-1.0.2.el9.src.rpm



Description of changes:

[3.32.15-1.0.2]
- Sync OL9 handler definitions with RHEL9
- Fixes bug where Kickstart reports ostreecontainer is an unknown command [Orabug: 38856710] [JIRA: OLDIS-50232]
